name: Lightweave Scarf (Major)
description:
The first of these strips of glittering cloth was worn by a monk from Jinin who would interweave it into his handwraps of mighty blows. The spell DC of any spell cast by activating this item is 38.

  • Armor You gain a +3 item bonus to saving throws against illusions and Deception checks to .
  • Weapon (visual) After you cast an illusion spell by activating the scarf, the weapon is shrouded in a mesmerizing illusory pattern. Your next Strike causes the target to be for 1 minute if it hits. If you don't make a Strike by the end of your next turn, the illusion ends with no effect.
